footer.buyMeACoffeeAria: Support the project on Buy Me a Coffee (opens in new tab)
landing.heroHeadline: Bring Your RPG Sessions to Life with Sound
landing.heroSupporting: SoundQuest is a soundboard designed for tabletop RPG sessions. Play ambience, music, and sound effects instantly to create immersive adventures.
landing.socialProofHeadline: Built for tabletop RPG players and Game Masters
landing.featuresHeading: Everything you need at the table
landing.featuresSubheading: Designed for speed and immersion so you can focus on the game.
landing.defaultSoundsSubheading: Preview ambience, combat, music, and more.
landing.defaultSoundsExplainLead: Default sounds are built into SoundQuest as a starter set for your soundboard. They are there so you keep your attention on the table, not on a pile of browser tabs.
landing.feature1Desc: Play ambient sounds and music instantly during RPG sessions.
landing.feature2Desc: Upload and organize your own sound effects and tracks.
landing.feature3Desc: Control the atmosphere of every scene without interrupting the game.
landing.feature4Desc: Trigger sounds instantly during live gameplay.
landing.feature5Desc: Create multiple soundboards (scenes) and switch between them per encounter or location.
landing.feature6Desc: Try the soundboard without creating an account.
landing.howSubheading: Get started in three simple steps.
landing.howStep1Desc: Add audio from URLs, upload your own files, or paste direct links.
landing.howStep2Desc: Organize sounds into scenes and label them for quick access.
landing.howStep3Desc: Trigger ambience and effects with one click while you run the game.
landing.interfaceDesc: A clear layout with sound buttons, volume sliders, and ambience controls so Game Masters can run audio without breaking flow.
landing.pricingSubheading: Start free and upgrade when you need more.
landing.pricingPlayerDesc: Designed for players who want a simple soundboard.
landing.plansSubheading: Start free and upgrade when you need more scenes, storage, and uploads.
landing.faq2Question: Can I upload my own sounds?
landing.faq2Answer: Yes. You can add sounds via URL (e.g. YouTube or direct audio links) or upload your own files.
landing.faq3Question: Do I need an account to try it?
landing.faq3Answer: No. You can continue as a guest and use the soundboard with data stored locally in your browser. Sign in to save and sync across devices.
landing.faq4Question: Is it designed for Game Masters?
landing.faq4Answer: Yes. SoundQuest is built for tabletop RPG sessions so GMs can play ambience, music, and sound effects instantly without interrupting the game.
landing.ctaHeadline: Start Enhancing Your RPG Sessions Today
landing.ctaSubtext: Create a free account or try as a guest.
landing.footerDescription: SoundQuest is a soundboard platform built to help tabletop RPG players create immersive adventures using music and ambient sound.
support.title: Support SoundQuest
support.intro: SoundQuest is a free open-source tool for RPG sessions. If it helps your table, consider supporting the project.
support.payWithCardAria: Pay with card via Stripe (opens in new tab)
support.payWithPixAria: Pay with Pix (opens in new tab)
support.pixQrHint: Scan the QR code or tap the button below to pay with Pix.

loginEnroll.title: Set up Google Authenticator
loginEnroll.scanQR: Scan the QR code with the Google Authenticator app (or Authy, etc.) or enter the code manually.
